- `[daemon] nip29-role-decision` → `debug` via tracing (hidden by default) [...]    - **`src/daemon/server/diagnostics.rs`**
     - `log_nip29_role_decision`: replaced `eprintln!` with `tracing::debug!(group, target, role, reason, "nip29 role decision")` [...] 
   **diagnostics.rs**: Converted `log_nip29_role_decision` from `eprintln!` to `tracing::debug!` with structured fields.
